pi_items.source: Task description line 5 specifies 'Save the portfolio as retirement_portfolio.xml'. Sample XML (data/sample_portfolio.xml) confirms portfolios/portfolio/name structure. Export script (export_result.sh line 60) confirms extraction of portfolio name without extension.

Task description line 5 specifies 'Set the base currency to USD'. Sample XML shows <baseCurrency>USD</baseCurrency> at line 4. Portfolio Performance manual confirms baseCurrency element in XML format. Export script (export_result.sh line 63-66) confirms extraction of baseCurrency from XML.

Task description line 5 specifies 'Create a securities account named Retirement Account'. Sample XML (data/sample_portfolio.xml lines 94-130) shows portfolios/portfolio/name structure containing securities account name. Export script (export_result.sh lines 76-83) confirms extraction via portfolios/portfolio/name.

Task description line 5 specifies 'Create a linked cash/deposit account named Retirement Account (USD)'. Sample XML (data/sample_portfolio.xml lines 69-91) shows accounts/account/name structure containing cash account name. Export script (export_result.sh lines 85-92) confirms extraction via accounts/account/name.

Task description line 5 specifies save directory as '/home/ga/Documents/PortfolioData/'. Environment setup (scripts/install_portfolio_performance.sh line 63 and scripts/setup_portfolio_performance.sh line 16) both create and configure this directory. Export script (export_result.sh line 14) searches for portfolio files in this directory. All scripts confirm this is the designated save location.

privileged_info_summary: The task 'create_portfolio@1' is a Portfolio Performance (v0.81.5) GUI automation task that requires creating a new investment portfolio with specific structure. All metadata claims are verified as correct: (1) Portfolio name 'retirement_portfolio' matches task requirement to save as 'retirement_portfolio.xml'; (2) Base currency 'USD' matches task requirement and Portfolio Performance XML baseCurrency element; (3) Securities account 'Retirement Account' matches task requirement and maps to portfolios/portfolio/name in XML; (4) Cash account 'Retirement Account (USD)' matches task requirement and maps to accounts/account/name in XML; (5) Save directory '/home/ga/Documents/PortfolioData' is created by environment setup and verified in all setup scripts. The Portfolio Performance application is real (open-source, GitHub repo portfolio-performance/portfolio v0.81.5 released Feb 8, 2026), uses XML format for portfolio files with confirmed structure (baseCurrency, portfolios/portfolio/name, accounts/account/name). Data is not synthetic but will be generated by the real Portfolio Performance GUI application when user completes the task. Verifier logic correctly matches metadata expectations to actual XML extraction methods.
